title: Image To Image Monochrome 3x3 Editorial Comp Card
sourceTitle: Image To Image Monochrome 3x3 Editorial Comp Card AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image ultra-realistic monochrome 3x3 editorial comp card using the uploaded reference identity for adult East Asian woman from an uploaded reference image with exact identity preserved. Subject: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Scene: Minimal luxury monochrome studio with fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, soft diffused lighting, clean light gray background, and Korean high-fashion beauty editorial atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 3x3 grid layout with nine separate editorial frames, consistent identity and styling in every panel, mixing front portraits, three-quarter angles, side profiles, close-ups, expression studies, hair detail, shoulder crop, and fashion beauty details defined by front portrait, profile, three-quarter portrait, beauty closeup, hair detail, shoulder crop, seated crop, expression study, and hands-near-face detail. Signature Elements: Uploaded reference identity, adult East Asian woman from an uploaded reference image with exact identity preserved, black sleeveless halter top, delicate silver necklace, natural makeup, glossy lips, deep black silky long hair, front portrait, profile, three-quarter portrait, beauty closeup, hair detail, shoulder crop, seated crop, expression study, and hands-near-face detail, fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, nine-frame monochrome grid, consistent face across all panels, natural skin texture, and luxury Korean editorial finish. Fixed source Style: Ultra-realistic black-and-white fashion comp card, Korean beauty editorial vibe, natural makeup, glossy lips, detailed realistic skin texture, minimal luxury studio polish, and high-end model-agency presentation. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Soft diffused studio lighting, gentle cheekbone and hair highlights, clean gray background separation, and consistent light direction across all nine panels. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: black sleeveless halter top, delicate silver necklace, natural makeup, glossy lips, deep black silky long hair, natural makeup texture, glossy lips, delicate jewelry, silky hair detail, smooth studio backdrop, and crisp grid gutters. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
